programs.title: Only Connect
programs.desc: Quiz show presented by Victoria Coren in which patience and lateral thinking are as vital as knowledge, and connections need to be made between apparently unconnected things.

programs.title: Dam Busters Declassified
programs.desc: Martin Shaw separates the fact from the myth as he takes to the skies to retrace the route of the 1943 raid by 617 Squadron which used bouncing bombs to destroy German dams.

programs.title: The Great Escaper
programs.desc: WWII veteran Bernard sneaks out of his care home to attend the 70th anniversary of D-Day. Contains some strong language.

programs.title: Glenda Jackson: Talking Pictures
programs.desc: Celia Imrie tells the story of Glenda Jackson, one of Britain's greatest-ever acting talents, who famously turned her back on her hugely successful screen career to pursue a life in politics.

programs.title: The Silence of the Lambs
programs.desc: An FBI trainee shares her nightmare memory in the hope of stopping a serial killer. Contains very strong language, prolonged violence and upsetting scenes.

programs.title: Anthony Hopkins: Talking Pictures
programs.desc: A look back at the life of Oscar-winning actor Sir Anthony Hopkins, featuring interviews conducted with the BBC over the course of his career.
